data.title: New calculator by American Alternative Assets reveals hidden annuity fees and contracts holding retirees' wealth hostage.
data.description: On July 4, 2025, in Woodland Hills, California, American Alternative Assets introduced a groundbreaking tool aiming to unveil the financial constraints faced by numerous retirees. The tool sheds light on how stringent contracts and undisclosed fees are constraining the wealth of millions of retired individuals. This initiative comes as Americans commemorate Independence Day, emphasizing the importance of financial freedom. The "Annuity Trap" tool is set to revolutionize the way retirees manage their finances, ensuring transparency and combating the hidden fees that hold an estimated large portion of retirees' assets captive.

data.title: Belgian court convicts 3 kidnappers in crypto investor's wife case with 12-year prison terms each. Masterminds still not caught.
data.description: The court has handed down a sentence of 12 years each to the three kidnappers and has also ordered them to pay civil damages. However, it was highlighted that the individuals who orchestrated the abduction are still on the run.

data.title: Bitcoin price may surge to $150K soon due to Trump's 'Big Beautiful Bill'. After US debt-boosting bills, Bitcoin has shown double-digit gains in weeks. Will this trend continue in 2025?
data.description: In the past, Bitcoin has shown significant increases in value after the signing of major US debt-increasing bills, often experiencing double-digit gains in the following weeks. The question arises whether this pattern will repeat in 2025.

data.title: Bitcoin ETF inflows exceed $600 million for the first time since May, with BlackRock’s IBIT and Fidelity’s FBTC driving Thursday’s surge amid market shifts and tax bill considerations.
data.description: On Thursday, BlackRock's IBIT and Fidelity's FBTC experienced significant inflows as investors adjusted their positions in response to President Trump's tax bill and changing market dynamics.
